title: Token OHLCV Chart
description: Real-time OHLCV candlestick data for any token — stream live candles via WebSocket for TradingView-style charts.
useCase: Power a real-time TradingView-style candlestick chart for any token — subscribe to live 1m/5m/1h OHLCV candles via WebSocket and update the chart as new candles close.
